Module CST239Milestone
Package service

Class InventoryManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • service.InventoryManager
  • public class InventoryManager
extends java.lang.Object
    Manages the store inventory. Requirements supported: - Initialize store inventory (invoked on StoreFront startup) - Remove stock when a product is purchased - Add stock when a purchase is canceled - Return the entire inventory

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      InventoryManager()  

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void addProduct​(SalableProduct product)
      Adds a product into the inventory system.
      void addStock​(java.lang.String name, int qty)
      Adds stock back to a product.
      java.util.Optional<SalableProduct> findByName​(java.lang.String name)
      Finds a product by name.
      boolean hasStock​(java.lang.String name, int qty)
      Checks if enough stock exists to cover a requested quantity.
      void initializeDefaultInventory()
      Loads default inventory into the store.
      java.util.List<SalableProduct> listProducts()
      Returns a list of all products in inventory.
      void removeStock​(java.lang.String name, int qty)
      Removes stock for a product.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • InventoryManager

        public InventoryManager()

    • Method Detail

      • initializeDefaultInventory

        public void initializeDefaultInventory()
        Loads default inventory into the store. This resets the inventory map to a known state.

      • addProduct

        public void addProduct​(SalableProduct product)
        Adds a product into the inventory system. If a product already exists with the same name, this overwrites the existing entry.
        Parameters:
        product - product to add

      • listProducts

        public java.util.List<SalableProduct> listProducts()
        Returns a list of all products in inventory.
        Returns:
        list of SalableProduct objects

      • findByName

        public java.util.Optional<SalableProduct> findByName​(java.lang.String name)
        Finds a product by name.
        Parameters:
        name - product name
        Returns:
        Optional containing product if found

      • hasStock

        public boolean hasStock​(java.lang.String name,
                        int qty)
        Checks if enough stock exists to cover a requested quantity.
        Parameters:
        name - product name
        qty - requested quantity
        Returns:
        true if product exists and has enough stock

      • removeStock

        public void removeStock​(java.lang.String name,
                        int qty)
        Removes stock for a product. Invoked when a product is purchased.
        Parameters:
        name - product name
        qty - quantity to remove

      • addStock

        public void addStock​(java.lang.String name,
                     int qty)
        Adds stock back to a product. Invoked when a purchase is canceled.
        Parameters:
        name - product name
        qty - quantity to add back
